message:
test(fwc): expand tests for 5 more modules (+251 tests)

template 16→55, routing 58→95, catalog 63→110,
secretless 64→117, pipe 60→135. Covers template rendering,
routing score calculations, catalog discovery, secretless
injection, and pipeline validation/binding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
